description_long: This is a compact, stylized handgun with a predominantly pink and gold color scheme, adorned with Hello Kitty graphics on both sides. The body features a boxy, angular design with a gold top rail and purple barrel accents, giving it a playful yet futuristic appearance. The grip is ergonomically shaped with gold highlights and a visible Hello Kitty motif on the magazine base. The trigger guard is robust and angular, matching the overall geometric aesthetic of the weapon. The slide has a digital ammunition counter display at the rear, adding a modern, high-tech touch. The surface finish is smooth with a glossy sheen, and the overall build suggests a mix of metal and polymer materials.
description: A compact, pink and gold handgun decorated with Hello Kitty graphics, featuring a digital ammo counter and a glossy, modern finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing Hello Kitty graphics, gold top rail, purple barrel, and detailed grip with gold highlights.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large barrel opening, purple muzzle, and gold top rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with additional Hello Kitty graphics, magazine base detail, and visible slide contours.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the digital ammo counter display and gold rear sight.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured for ergonomic handling, with a gold metallic finish on the lower portion and a smooth, slightly curved surface. It features a visible Hello Kitty motif on the magazine base, and the grip itself appears to be made of polymer with a glossy overlay. There are subtle finger grooves for improved hold, and the overall design is playful yet functional, matching the whimsical theme of the handgun.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, angular, and robust, with a squared-off front edge and a gold accent matching the grip. It is integrated seamlessly into the lower frame, providing ample space for finger placement and offering a reinforced, sturdy appearance. The guard lacks texturing but stands out due to its geometric, modern design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and wide, with a prominent, circular muzzle opening finished in black and purple. It has a smooth exterior with no visible threading or porting, and the purple accent gives it a distinctive, stylized look. The barrel is integrated into the upper slide, contributing to the compact profile of the handgun.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features large Hello Kitty graphics on both sides, with no visible manufacturer logos, serial numbers, or caliber designations. The most prominent marking is the digital ammunition counter display at the rear of the slide, which shows the number '30' in white on a black background. Decorative patterns are limited to the playful Hello Kitty motifs.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat with a slight extension, featuring a beveled edge and a Hello Kitty graphic. It is finished in gray with a pink accent, and the base is contoured to fit flush with the grip, providing a visually cohesive and ergonomic design.
